title: When person assigned to subitem , subscribe them to the main item conversation
excerpt: Hi ! So something that could be useful is having the feature to automatically subscribe a person to a conversation in the parent item once they are associated with subitems. A simple automation could do this but it could…

posts.author: Dian94 (Dian Maritz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi ! So something that could be useful is having the feature to automatically subscribe a person to a conversation in the parent item once they are associated with subitems. A simple automation could do this but it could probably also work as a setting if that makes more sense. It will help with group comms with people associated in subitems but not in main item.
